title: selaginella blepharophylla
intro: Selaginella blepharophylla, also known as the water fern or resurrection fern, is a type of resurrection plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world, including the Americas, Africa, and Asia. The medicinal properties of Selaginella blepharophylla include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Selaginella blepharophylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system.
